items.title: Support Vector Machines (Cortes & Vapnik, 1995)
items.author: Cortes, Vapnik
items.note: Original soft-margin SVM paper introducing slack variables and penalty C for non-separable data.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Chapter 7: margin-based classifiers, support vectors, and kernel overview.

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning (Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman)
items.author: Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman
items.note: Max-margin classifiers, support vector machines, and regularization path.

items.title: scikit-learn SVC documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: API for C, kernels, support_vectors_, decision_function, and soft-margin training.
